code.finalize: data.enemy_action = result["enemy_action"] data.enemy_target_id = result["enemy_target_id"] data.enemy_target = result["enemy_target"] data.current_player = result["current_player"] data.initiative_order = result["initiative_order"]

default.title: It is #'s turn!
default.message: Please wait while the enemy decides...

manipulate.label: Determine Enemy Attack & Damage Rolls and Finalize Enemy Action
manipulate.code:
# --- Helpers ---
def find_player_in_order(order, pid) order.find { |ent| ent.is_a?(Hash) && ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == pid.to_s } end
def reckless?(pl) conds = (pl["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s) conds.include?("reckless") end
def shielded?(pl) conds = (pl["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s) conds.include?("shielded") end
def raging?(pl) conds = (pl["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s) conds.include?("raging") end
# --- Variables ---
action_id = data.enemy_action.to_i target = find_player_in_order(data.initiative_order, data.enemy_target_id.to_s)
actions = data.current_player["actions"]
action = actions.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_i == 1 }
action_name = action["title"].to_s dice_count = action["no_of_dice"].to_i die_type = action["die"].to_s fear_cost = action["fear_cost"].to_i
# --- Determine Attack Roll ---
base_roll = if reckless?(target) r1 = rand(1..20) r2 = rand(1..20) [r1, r2].max else rand(1..20) end
attack_roll = base_roll + data.configuration["enemy_attack_bonus"].to_i
# --- Determine Hit ---
base_ac = target["ac"].to_i effective_ac = base_ac + (shielded?(target) ? 5 : 0)
hit = (attack_roll >= effective_ac)
enemy_title = data.current_player["title"].to_s target_title = target["title"].to_s
if !hit data.title = "#{enemy_title} misses #{target_title} with #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{attack_roll} to Hit vs #{effective_ac} AC..." else die_sides = die_type.sub(/^d/i, "").to_i
raw_damage = 0 if dice_count > 0 && die_sides > 0 dice_count.times { raw_damage += rand(1..die_sides) } end
actual_damage = raw_damage
if raging?(target) actual_damage = (actual_damage / 2.0).floor end
old_hp = (target["hp"] || 0).to_i new_hp = old_hp - actual_damage new_hp = 0 if new_hp < 0 target["hp"] = new_hp
conds = target["conditions"].map(&:to_s) conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged") target["conditions"] = conds
data.title = "#{enemy_title} hits #{target_title} with #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} takes #{actual_damage} damage." end
data.configuration["fear"] = [data.configuration["fear"].to_i - fear_cost, 0].max data.current_player["damaged_by"] = []
# --- Sync Target and Enemy into Initiative Order ---
enemy_id = data.current_player["id"].to_s target_id = target["id"].to_s
data.initiative_order.map! do |ent| next ent unless ent.is_a?(Hash) if ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == target_id target elsif ent["type"].to_s == "enemy" && ent["id"].to_s == enemy_id data.current_player else ent end end
# --- Sync Target into Player Data ---
data.player_data.map! do |pl| if pl.is_a?(Hash) && pl["id"].to_s == target["id"] target else pl end end

manipulate.label: Determine Save Parameters
manipulate.code:
# --- Helpers ---
def find_player_in_order(order, pid) order.find do |ent| ent.is_a?(Hash) && ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == pid.to_s end end
def ability_from_player(player, ability_id) abilities = player["abilities"] || [] abilities.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_s == ability_id.to_s } end
# --- Variables ---
enemy = data.current_player order = data.initiative_order
target_id = data.enemy_target_id.to_s target = find_player_in_order(order, target_id)
actions = enemy["actions"] action = actions.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_i == 2 }
dc_type = action["dc_type"].to_s ability = ability_from_player(target, dc_type) ability_title = ability["title"].to_s saving_bonus = ability["saving_throw"].to_i
enemy_title = enemy["title"].to_s target_title = target["title"].to_s
data.title = "#{enemy_title} recoils back and opens its mouth wide as green saliva begins to gather in its maw. #{target_title}, please make a #{ability_title} saving throw!" data.message = "Roll 1d20 and add your #{ability_title} saving throw bonus..." data.max_roll = 20 + saving_bonus

manipulate.label: Determine Player Save & Damage and Conditions, and Finalize Enemy Action
manipulate.code:
# --- Helpers ---
def find_player_in_order(order, pid) order.find do |ent| ent.is_a?(Hash) && ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == pid.to_s end end
def raging?(pl) (pl["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s).include?("raging") end
def roll_damage(dice_count, die_type) dc = dice_count.to_i sides = die_type.to_s.sub(/^d/i, "").to_i return 0 if dc <= 0 || sides <= 0
total = 0
dc.times { total += rand(1..sides) } total end
# --- Variables ---
action_id = data.enemy_action.to_i enemy_id = data.current_player["id"].to_s target_id = data.enemy_target_id.to_s
target = find_player_in_order(data.initiative_order, data.enemy_target_id.to_s) actions = data.current_player["actions"] action = actions.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_i == data.enemy_action.to_i }
enemy_title = data.current_player["title"].to_s target_title = target["title"].to_s action_name = action["title"].to_s
dc = data.configuration["enemy_dc"].to_i roll = data.player_roll.to_i
fear_cost = action["fear_cost"].to_i data.configuration["fear"] = [data.configuration["fear"].to_i - fear_cost, 0].max
success = (roll >= dc)
# --- Resolve outcome ---
conds = (target["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s)
if !success gm_factor = data.configuration["gm_factor"].to_i data.configuration["fear"] = data.configuration["fear"].to_i + (2 * gm_factor)
if action_id == 2 raw = roll_damage(action["no_of_dice"], action["die"]) dmg = raw dmg = (dmg / 2.0).floor if raging?(target) dmg = 0 if dmg < 0
target["hp"] = [target["hp"].to_i - dmg, 0].max
conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged") target["conditions"] = conds
data.title = "#{enemy_title} drenches #{target_title} with #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} takes #{dmg} damage..." else effect = action["effect"].to_s conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged") conds << effect unless effect.empty? || conds.include?(effect) target["conditions"] = conds
data.current_player["target"] = target_id data.title = "#{enemy_title} snares #{target_title} with #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} is now #{effect}..." end
else if action_id == 2 raw = roll_damage(action["no_of_dice"], action["die"]) dmg = (raw / 2.0).floor dmg = (dmg / 2.0).floor if raging?(target) dmg = 0 if dmg < 0
target["hp"] = [target["hp"].to_i - dmg, 0].max
conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged")
target["conditions"] = conds
data.title = "#{target_title} withstands the worst of #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} takes #{dmg} damage..." else data.title = "#{target_title} resists #{action_name} and was unaffected!" data.message = "Please wait..." end end
data.current_player["damaged_by"] = []
# --- Sync Target and Enemy into Initiative Order ---
data.initiative_order.map! do |ent| next ent unless ent.is_a?(Hash) if ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == target_id target elsif ent["type"].to_s == "enemy" && ent["id"].to_s == enemy_id data.current_player else ent end end
# --- Sync Target into Player Data --- data.player_data.map! do |pl| if pl.is_a?(Hash) && pl["id"].to_s == target_id target else pl end end

manipulate.label: Determine Save Parameters
manipulate.code:
# --- Helpers ---
def find_player_in_order(order, pid) order.find do |ent| ent.is_a?(Hash) && ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == pid.to_s end end
def ability_from_player(player, ability_id) abilities = player["abilities"] || [] abilities.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_s == ability_id.to_s } end
# --- Variables ---
enemy = data.current_player order = data.initiative_order
target_id = data.enemy_target_id.to_s target = find_player_in_order(order, target_id)
actions = enemy["actions"] action = actions.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_i == 3 }
dc_type = action["dc_type"].to_s ability = ability_from_player(target, dc_type)
ability_title = ability["title"].to_s saving_bonus = ability["saving_throw"].to_i
enemy_title = enemy["title"].to_s target_title = target["title"].to_s
data.title = "#{enemy_title} lashes out with a sticky, barbed tongue, snapping toward #{target_title}. #{target_title}, please make a #{ability_title} saving throw!" data.message = "Roll 1d20 and add your #{ability_title} saving throw bonus..." data.max_roll = 20 + saving_bonus

manipulate.label: Determine Player Save & Damage and Conditions, and Finalize Enemy Action
manipulate.code:
# --- Helpers ---
def find_player_in_order(order, pid) order.find do |ent| ent.is_a?(Hash) && ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == pid.to_s end end
def raging?(pl) (pl["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s).include?("raging") end
def roll_damage(dice_count, die_type) dc = dice_count.to_i sides = die_type.to_s.sub(/^d/i, "").to_i return 0 if dc <= 0 || sides <= 0
total = 0
dc.times { total += rand(1..sides) } total end
# --- Variables ---
action_id = data.enemy_action.to_i enemy_id = data.current_player["id"].to_s target_id = data.enemy_target_id.to_s
target = find_player_in_order(data.initiative_order, data.enemy_target_id.to_s) actions = data.current_player["actions"] action = actions.find { |a| a.is_a?(Hash) && a["id"].to_i == data.enemy_action.to_i }
enemy_title = data.current_player["title"].to_s target_title = target["title"].to_s action_name = action["title"].to_s
dc = data.configuration["enemy_dc"].to_i roll = data.player_roll.to_i
fear_cost = action["fear_cost"].to_i data.configuration["fear"] = [data.configuration["fear"].to_i - fear_cost, 0].max
success = (roll >= dc)
# --- Resolve outcome ---
conds = (target["conditions"] || []).map(&:to_s)
if !success gm_factor = data.configuration["gm_factor"].to_i data.configuration["fear"] = data.configuration["fear"].to_i + (2 * gm_factor)
if action_id == 2 raw = roll_damage(action["no_of_dice"], action["die"]) dmg = raw dmg = (dmg / 2.0).floor if raging?(target) dmg = 0 if dmg < 0
target["hp"] = [target["hp"].to_i - dmg, 0].max
conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged") target["conditions"] = conds
data.title = "#{enemy_title} drenches #{target_title} with #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} takes #{dmg} damage..." else effect = action["effect"].to_s conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged") conds << effect unless effect.empty? || conds.include?(effect) target["conditions"] = conds
data.current_player["target"] = target_id data.title = "#{enemy_title} snares #{target_title} with #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} is now #{effect}..." end
else if action_id == 2 raw = roll_damage(action["no_of_dice"], action["die"]) dmg = (raw / 2.0).floor dmg = (dmg / 2.0).floor if raging?(target) dmg = 0 if dmg < 0
target["hp"] = [target["hp"].to_i - dmg, 0].max
conds << "damaged" unless conds.include?("damaged")
target["conditions"] = conds
data.title = "#{target_title} withstands the worst of #{action_name}!" data.message = "#{target_title} takes #{dmg} damage..." else data.title = "#{target_title} resists #{action_name} and was unaffected!" data.message = "Please wait..." end end
data.current_player["damaged_by"] = []
# --- Sync Target and Enemy into Initiative Order ---
data.initiative_order.map! do |ent| next ent unless ent.is_a?(Hash) if ent["type"].to_s == "player" && ent["id"].to_s == target_id target elsif ent["type"].to_s == "enemy" && ent["id"].to_s == enemy_id data.current_player else ent end end
# --- Sync Target into Player Data --- data.player_data.map! do |pl| if pl.is_a?(Hash) && pl["id"].to_s == target_id target else pl end end

manipulate.label: Update Enemy End Turn Message
manipulate.code: data.title = "It is ending its turn! Please wait for the next turn..." data.message = "Please wait..."

code.finalize:
data.title = nil data.message = nil data.enemy_action = nil data.enemy_target_id = nil data.enemy_target = nil
data.max_roll = nil data.player_roll = nil

data.initiative_order = result["initiative_order"] data.current_player = result["current_player"] data.round = result["round"] data.game_state = result["game_state"] data.player_data = result["player_data"] data.configuration = result["configuration"]
